subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath turned towards the Dawning-Place of grace, and We bestow upon him a bounty from Our presence, for verily We are the All-Bountiful, the Most Generous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من توجه الی مشرق الفضل و نویده فضلا من لدنا و انا الفضال الکریم قد ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
